cardTitle: Quilted Padded Neoprene Makeup Bag with Custom Embossed Logo
cardSubtitle: Low MOQ 100pcs  ·Custom Embossed Logo Waterproof Neoprene Pouch
logo: Embossed Logo, Silk Screen Printing, Heat Transfer Printing, Custom Logo Method Available
application: Travel, Daily Makeup Storage, Beauty Organization, Toiletry Storage, Promotional Gifts, Retail Sales, Brand Merchandise
title: Quilted Neoprene Cosmetic Pouch With Custom Embossed Brand Logo
seoTitle: Custom Embossed Logo Quilted Neoprene Makeup Bag Low MOQ 100pcs Wholesale Manufacturer
description:
Introducing our premium quilted padded neoprene makeup bag, a versatile storage pouch designed to balance soft comfort, durable protection and customizable branding for global brands, retailers and personal users. Crafted from high-density soft-touch neoprene fabric, this cosmetic bag stands out from ordinary polyester pouches with its water-resistant, stain-proof and easy-to-clean properties. Any spilled liquid foundation, perfume or skincare serum can be wiped away effortlessly with a damp cloth, leaving no stubborn marks, which makes it perfect for messy daily makeup routines and long-distance travel.
The signature three-section quilted stitching forms a thick padded layer inside the bag, offering reliable shockproof buffer for your fragile beauty essentials. Makeup brushes, glass perfume bottles, liquid lipsticks and compact powders will not be squeezed, scratched or broken when stored inside. The lightweight material adds zero extra weight to your handbag, suitcase or backpack, fully matching the “travel-friendly” demand of modern beauty lovers. We supply multiple stock solid colors including lavender purple, mint green and chocolate brown, while custom Pantone color matching is available to fit your brand’s visual style.
This multi-functional neoprene pouch has wide application scenarios. It works as daily makeup storage bag, travel toiletry organizer, salon accessory pouch, boutique retail product and corporate promotional gift. Whether you sell beauty products online, run a physical cosmetic store or launch a new skincare brand, this stylish bag can boost your brand exposure effectively.
As a professional neoprene bag manufacturer, we provide small-batch wholesale with a low MOQ of only 100pcs, lowering market test risks for startup sellers. We support full OEM & ODM services: custom embossed logos, personalized colors, adjusted sizes and branded packaging. Every product goes through strict QC inspection before shipment to guarantee stable quality. If you are looking for soft, durable and customizable cosmetic pouches with competitive factory direct prices, our quilted neoprene makeup bag will be your ideal wholesale choice.
seoDescription: Factory quilted padded neoprene makeup bag with custom embossed logo, water-resistant soft cosmetic pouch. Low MOQ 100pcs, OEM private label & multi stock colors for beauty brand bulk wholesale travel storage.
